name: io.github.Crindo2/gph-mcp-server
title: GPH Intelligence — Healthcare Service Provider Finder (API key required)
description: Paid MCP for 103,000+ verified healthcare service providers with enriched firmographics (Apollo employee counts, revenue estimates, LinkedIn URLs, quality scores). Requires API key — subscription from $149/mo or $0.50/call PAYG. Get started at https://www.getpracticehelp.com/api-access/. Tools: match_practice, search_providers, get_provider_detail.
